---
title: 'UUUUUHHHHHHGGGGGG!'
date: '2017-08-27T02:23:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1603765036435830571'
blogger_filename: '/2017/08/uuuuuhhhhhhgggggg.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

I don't know how much longer I can take this. That selfish bitch is working nights so her spoiled kids don't have to stay at home alone. When are you going to realize you failed at being a wife and now you're failing at being a homeschool mom. Put the fucking kids in school, get a real career, and lose about 150 lbs... MAYBE then I might find you attractive.<br />
<br />
I hate Idaho. I hate ICCU. I hate this house. I hate my family. I hate my wife. I hate God.<br />
<br />
I wish I'd stayed in Irving, got a small apartment by myself, and drank myself into oblivion every night, except for the nights Alison could stop by.<br />
<br />
Fuck you Jesus! And fuck your failed promises.<br />
<br />
Why won't you just let me die already? Why are you so selfish and demented to make me stay 37 years on this fucked up planet! Fuck you!<br />
<br />
<br />
D
